name: Liberty Park
description: Liberty Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Loudon, TN. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Tellico Village Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Tellico Village Wellness Center in Loudon, TN! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
